KEA/CET Quota Admission Process & Fee Details for 15 Year B. E., 2024-2025
> Students to obtain allotment letter from KEA, report at Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE),
Building No.02, Main Library for verification of admission order issued by respective authorities and original
> Students need to report at Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE), Building No.02, Main Library,
wait for the turn to complete the admission process (online entry).
> All original documents should be scanned (Color) in JPEG format within 1MB and to be keep ready in mobile

> Get application printed producing the fee paid challan (refer your application no. obtained from step — 2)
> Submit all the necessary original documents & obtain the acknowledgement at Building No.2 — Main Library
